description: Output specification, field description and control (program described)
help: Field description and control entries for a program-described file.

parameters.name: OUTIND
parameters.help: Indicators that condition output of this field (three sets).

parameters.name: FIELDNAME
parameters.help: The name of the field to write.

parameters.name: EDITCODE
parameters.help: The edit code applied to a numeric field.

parameters.name: BLANKAFT
parameters.help: B = set the field to blanks or zeros after it is written.

parameters.name: ENDPOS
parameters.help: The ending position within the record.

parameters.name: DATAFMT
parameters.help: The data format of a date or time field.

parameters.name: CONSTANT
parameters.help: A constant, an edit word, data attributes, or a format name.

parameters.name: COMMENT
parameters.help: The comment area of the specification (positions 81-100).
